programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Escalator Handrails; Highlighter Pens; Guitar Strings
programme.desc: The hosts explore how escalator handrails, highlighters, guitar strings and wigs are made, as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Henri and Kellie face poachers and a dry streak. Also, the `Dirt Dogs' need to break new ground in order to stay in business, while the `Gold Gypsies' search for precious reef gold.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Suits of Armor; Street Light Poles; Membrane Switches
programme.desc: Find out how suits of armor are constructed, how street light poles are erected, how poles are bent and what goes on in a membrane switch.

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: A fire breaks out on UPS Flight six; as smoke fills the cockpit, getting the plane to safety is a race against time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Nerve Center
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the IndyCar Championship at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway which ends with a fiery crash resulting in the death of driver Dan Wheldon.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The pressure of a dwindling quota is starting to affect the captains, who realize the season could come to a sudden end; as a storm looms, the decision to stay out on the water could be detrimental to the boats battling it out for the top position.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: It's robot knockout time, with the round of 32 launching the quest for the world championship; for favorites like Hydra and Whiplash there's danger in every match-up, as up-and-coming teams look to shake up the bracket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
